mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clock_record (user_id, plan_id, record_date, finish_item, total_item, unfinish_reason, finish_rate, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{planId}, #{recordDate}, #{finishItem}, #{totalItem}, #{unfinishReason}, #{finishRate}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE clock_record SET finish_item = #{finishItem}, total_item = #{totalItem}, unfinish_reason = #{unfinishReason}, finish_rate = #{finishRate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM clock_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM clock_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND plan_id = #{planId} AND record_date = #{recordDate} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM clock_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY record_date DESC
SELECT * FROM clock_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY record_date ASC
SELECT * FROM clock_record WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY record_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE clock_record SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clock_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT SUM(JSON_LENGTH(finish_item)) FROM clock_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT SUM(JSON_LENGTH(total_item)) FROM clock_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_deleted = 0
